interactions.summary: Jiang closes the first half of the lecture by saying the Yamnaya mark a new history for humanity and that the class will explore that history after the break.

claims.claim: Jiang concludes that the Yamnaya transition marks a new history for humanity.

signature_moments.moment: The lecture closes the conquest story as the start of a new human history.
signature_moments.source_phrase: this marks a new history for humanity
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It names the Yamnaya not as an episode inside history but as a boundary between histories.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang's closing phrase for the world opened by the Yamnaya transition.

chronology_notes.note: Jiang indicates the class will continue after a break; this is lecture sequencing, not a separate historical claim.
